name: Brevo
description: Sync Brevo contacts, email campaigns, and contact lists into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Your Brevo API key. Found in Settings → API Keys in your Brevo account.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /v3/account and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with account email and plan.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Brevo contacts and email campaigns into the knowledge base.

methods.name: Get Contact
methods.description: Retrieve a single contact by email or id.

methods.name: List Contact Lists
methods.description: Paginated list of Brevo contact lists (offset-based).

methods.name: List Campaigns
methods.description: Paginated list of Brevo email campaigns, optionally filtered by status.

apis.name: Install / Authenticate
apis.description: Validate the api_key by calling GET /v3/account.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Ping GET /v3/account and return current health with email/plan.

apis.name: Sync Records
apis.description: Sync Brevo contacts and email campaigns into the knowledge base.

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: Retrieve a single contact by email or id.

apis.name: List Contact Lists
apis.description: Paginated list of Brevo contact lists.

apis.name: List Campaigns
apis.description: Paginated list of Brevo email campaigns, optionally filtered by status.
